arts.ttl: Every word Unai Emery said about PSG response, Villa 'in risk' and no excuses ahead of Southampton
arts.sum: "We were in risk in that moment not to have the opportunity like we are now to try to face the Premier League as well with our ambition at the beginning of the season to repeat again to play in the top five position. Aston Villa manager Unai Emery sat down with the media ahead of the Premier League clash against Southampton this weekend.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery says Aston Villa must not drop performance levels against Southampton
arts.sum: Southampton’s instant return to the Championship was confirmed last week.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery makes 'sack' admission as he warns players about why Nassef Sawiris hired him
arts.sum: Unai Emery will continue to be relentless in his demands of his Aston Villa players, because the day he stops is the day he risks losing his reputation in football. Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has warned his players not to take Southampton lightly this weekend

arts.ttl: Aston Villa in talks with Uefa over deal after breach of squad cost rules
arts.sum: Club negotiating financial deal with governing body Breach of 80% cap pertains to 2023-24 campaign Aston Villa have begun discussions with Uefa’s club financial control body over a financial settlement after being found in breach of the European governing body’s squad cost ratio rules (SCR) last season. Under Uefa regulations clubs in European competition were required to keep spending on player wages and fees to 80% of revenue last season, a figure which has dropped to 70% of revenue this season. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Team News: Southampton vs. Aston Villa injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Southampton and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa team news and injury update for Southampton clash as Unai Emery provides latest
arts.sum: Aston Villa team news and injury update for Southampton clash as Unai Emery provides latest Aston Villa manager Unai Emery currently has no new injury concerns ahead of Saturday’s Premier League clash with Southampton.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City legend launches Aston Villa attack as Marcus Rashford and Marco Asensio singled out
arts.sum: Birmingham City legend Christophe Dugarry has launched an astonishing attack on Aston Villa in the wake of their Champions League defeat to Paris Saint-Germain. Dugarry has been heavily critical of Villa, singling out Marco Asensio, who is on loan at Villa from PSG, and Marcus Rashford and even saying the Villans “don’t belong” in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Villa to wear all-white away kit at Wembley
arts.sum: Fixtures Crystal Palace Vs. Aston Villa - Sat, Apr 26th 2025, 17:15 Aston Villa will wear our all-white away kit for the club’s FA Cup semi-final against Crystal Palace at Wembley. Unai Emery’s side face the Eagles in the capital on Saturday, April 26 (ko 5.15pm) for a place in the final of the world’s oldest domestic cup competition. Villa, who last reached Wembley in the 2020 Carabao Cup final, will participate in the club’s fourth FA Cup semi-final since the turn of the century and first for 10 years. And the Villans will don our change strip – white shirts, shorts and socks – for the occasion. Villa’s goalkeepers will wear black shirts, shorts and socks for the semi-final showdown. Supporters can gear up for our trip to Wembley with 2024/25 replica shirts available at the Villa Store now. Fans can get kitted out for the semi-final, with shirts available for just £35 (adult) and £30 (children), exclusively on site at Villa Park. FA Cup sleeve badges are also available to add to kit for an additional £5, with the number '7' featured on the badge representing the number of times Villa have previously won the competition. The Villa Store is open 9.30am to 5.30pm Monday to Saturday, and 10am to 4pm on Sundays, subject to change on matchdays, while supporters are also reminded to stop by the all-new Holte End Outlet, open Thursday to Sunday, 10am to 4pm. Those not able to shop in person at the Villa Store can also take advantage of the online exclusive kit sale with up to 50% off, click here. For directions to the Villa Store at Villa Park, click below. Shop at the Villa Store Get Directions

arts.ttl: “Catastrophic” – Birmingham City icon mocks Aston Villa, fully disappointed by PSG showing
arts.sum: Birmingham City icon Christophe Dugarry has said he was unimpressed by Aston Villa this week, insisting their performance was a demonstration of why they are 7th in the Premier League. RMC Sport have comments from Dugarry today as the French media continue to analyse Paris Saint-Germain’s 3-1 win in the Champions League quarter finals. arts.ttl: Aston Villa's PSR fate is clear - but transfer masterclass proves one thing
arts.sum: Aston Villa have climbed to great heights in a short space of time, but they are still constrained by Profit and Sustainability Rules (PSR) until they can consistently generate revenues comparable to those of the ‘big six’. Villa, meanwhile, must sell players to generate funds for reinvestment in their squad.
